+          <Button
+            variant="contained"
+            onClick={() => {
+              if (categoryDialogMode === "create") {
+                simpleCategoryMutation.mutate({
+                  path: "/api/dashboard/categories",
+                  method: "POST",
+                  body: JSON.stringify({ name: categoryDraft })
+                });
+              } else if (editingCategoryId) {
+                simpleCategoryMutation.mutate({
+                  path: `/api/dashboard/categories/${editingCategoryId}`,
+                  method: "PATCH",
+                  body: JSON.stringify({ name: categoryDraft })
+                });
+              }
+              setCategoryDialogMode(null);
+            }}
+          >
+            {dictionary.save}
+          </Button>
+        </DialogActions>
+      </Dialog>
+
+      <Dialog
+        open={detailSelection !== null}
+        onClose={() => setDetailSelection(null)}
+        fullWidth
+        maxWidth="lg"
+      >
+        <DialogTitle>{detailSelection?.detail?.title ?? detailSelection?.title}</DialogTitle>
+        <DialogContent dividers>
+          <Stack spacing={1.5}>
+            <Stack direction={{ xs: "column", md: "row" }} spacing={1} useFlexGap sx={{ flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
+              <Chip
+                size="small"
+                label={detailSelection?.detail?.kind ?? dictionary.text}
+              />
+              {detailSelection?.sourcePath ? (
+                <Chip
+                  size="small"
+                  variant="outlined"
+                  label={`${dictionary.detailPath}: ${detailSelection.sourcePath}`}
+                />
+              ) : null}
+              {detailSelection?.detail?.updatedAt ? (
+                <Chip
+                  size="small"
+                  variant="outlined"
+                  label={`${dictionary.detailUpdatedAt}: ${formatDate(detailSelection.detail.updatedAt, selectedProject?.language ?? "en")}`}
+                />
+              ) : null}
+            </Stack>
+
+            {detailSelection?.detail ? (
+              detailSelection.detail.kind === "diff" ? (
+                <DiffViewer value={detailSelection.detail.content} />
+              ) : (
+                <Paper
+                  variant="outlined"
+                  sx={{
+                    p: 2,
+                    borderRadius: 4,
+                    maxHeight: "65vh",
+                    overflow: "auto",
+                    backgroundColor: alpha(theme.palette.common.black, 0.02)
+                  }}
+                >
+                  <Typography
+                    component="pre"
+                    sx={{
+                      m: 0,
+                      whiteSpace: "pre-wrap",
+                      fontFamily:
+                        detailSelection.detail.kind === "markdown"
+                          ? theme.typography.fontFamily
+                          : '"IBM Plex Mono", "SFMono-Regular", monospace',
+                      fontSize: detailSelection.detail.kind === "markdown" ? "0.95rem" : "0.84rem",
+                      lineHeight: 1.7
+                    }}
+                  >
+                    {detailSelection.detail.content}
+                  </Typography>
+                </Paper>
+              )
+            ) : (
+              <Alert severity="info">{dictionary.detailUnavailable}</Alert>
+            )}
+          </Stack>
+        </DialogContent>
+        <DialogActions>
+          <Button onClick={() => setDetailSelection(null)}>{dictionary.cancel}</Button>
+        </DialogActions>
+      </Dialog>
+    </Box>
+  );
+}
+
+function MetricCard(props: { label: string; value: string; accent?: boolean }) {
+  return (
+    <Paper
+      sx={{
+        p: 1.75,
+        borderRadius: 4,
+        backgroundColor: props.accent ? alpha("#d1643a", 0.12) : alpha("#ffffff", 0.76)
+      }}
+    >
+      <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
+        {props.label}
+      </Typography>
+      <Typography variant="h5" sx={{ mt: 0.75 }}>
+        {props.value}
+      </Typography>
+    </Paper>
+  );
+}
+
+function MetricRow(props: { label: string; value: string }) {
+  return (
+    <Box>
+      <Typography variant="caption" color="text.secondary">
+        {props.label}
+      </Typography>
+      <Typography variant="body2" sx={{ wordBreak: "break-word" }}>
+        {props.value}
+      </Typography>
+    </Box>
+  );
+}
+
+function DiffViewer(props: { value: string }) {
+  return (
+    <Paper
+      variant="outlined"
+      sx={{
+        p: 0,
+        borderRadius: 4,
+        maxHeight: "65vh",
+        overflow: "auto",
+        backgroundColor: alpha("#161311", 0.96)
+      }}
+    >
+      <Box component="pre" sx={{ m: 0, p: 2, fontSize: "0.82rem", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
+        {props.value.split("\n").map((line, index) => {
+          const backgroundColor = line.startsWith("+")
+            ? "rgba(57, 179, 92, 0.16)"
+            : line.startsWith("-")
+              ? "rgba(248, 81, 73, 0.16)"
+              : "transparent";
+          const color = line.startsWith("@@")
+            ? "#f2c55c"
+            : line.startsWith("+")
+              ? "#8bd49f"
+              : line.startsWith("-")
+                ? "#f2a2a2"
+                : "#f7efe6";
+          return (
+            <Box
+              key={`${index}:${line}`}
+              component="div"
+              sx={{
+                px: 1.25,
+                borderRadius: 1,
+                backgroundColor,
+                color,
+                whiteSpace: "pre-wrap",
+                fontFamily: '"IBM Plex Mono", "SFMono-Regular", monospace'
+              }}
+            >
+              {line || " "}
+            </Box>
+          );
+        })}
+      </Box>
+    </Paper>
+  );
+}
+
+function applyOptimisticMove(
+  snapshot: DashboardSnapshot,
+  payload: { projectId: string; targetCategoryId: string; targetIndex?: number }
+): DashboardSnapshot {
+  const categories = snapshot.categories.map((category) => ({
+    ...category,
+    projectIds: category.projectIds.filter((projectId) => projectId !== payload.projectId)
+  }));
+  const target = categories.find((category) => category.id === payload.targetCategoryId);
+  if (target) {
+    const index = Math.max(0, Math.min(payload.targetIndex ?? target.projectIds.length, target.projectIds.length));
+    target.projectIds.splice(index, 0, payload.projectId);
+  }
+
+  return {
+    ...snapshot,
+    categories,
+    projects: snapshot.projects.map((project) =>
+      project.id === payload.projectId
+        ? {
+            ...project,
+            categoryIds: categories
+              .filter((category) => category.projectIds.includes(project.id))
+              .map((category) => category.id)
+          }
+        : project
+    )
+  };
+}
+
+function formatDate(value: string, language: "ko" | "en"): string {
+  return new Date(value).toLocaleString(language === "ko" ? "ko-KR" : "en-US");
+}
+
+function inferNodeStage(node: WorkflowNode): string {
+  if (node.data.stage) {
+    return node.data.stage;
+  }
+  if (node.type === "fileDiff") {
+    return "implementation";
+  }
+  if (node.type === "test") {
+    return "qa";
+  }
+  if (node.type === "review") {
+    if (node.data.path?.includes("proposal.review")) {
+      return "proposal";
+    }
+    if (node.data.path?.includes("plan.review")) {
+      return "plan";
+    }
+    if (node.data.path?.includes("code.review")) {
+      return "implementation";
+    }
+    return "qa";
+  }
+  return "implementation";
+}
+
+function stageWeight(stage: string | null): number {
+  const order = ["proposal", "plan", "task", "implementation", "qa"];
+  const resolved = stage ?? "implementation";
+  const index = order.indexOf(resolved);
+  return index >= 0 ? index : 3;
+}
+
+function estimateNodeSize(node: WorkflowNode): { width: number; height: number } {
+  const primary = node.data.label ?? node.id;
+  const secondary = node.data.path ?? node.data.diffRef ?? "";
+  const longest = Math.max(primary.length, secondary.length, 18);
+  const width = Math.min(360, Math.max(220, longest * 6.4));
+  const lineCount = Math.ceil(primary.length / 24) + Math.ceil(Math.max(secondary.length, 1) / 34) + 1;
+  const height = Math.min(180, Math.max(96, 54 + lineCount * 20));
+  return { width, height };
+}
+
+function buildWorkflowModel(
+  workflow: WorkflowDocument,
+  topicStage: string | null,
+  theme: ReturnType<typeof useTheme>
+): { nodes: Array<Node<FlowNodeData>>; edges: Edge[] } {
+  const indegree = new Map<string, number>();
+  const ranks = new Map<string, number>();
+  const outgoing = new Map<string, string[]>();
+
+  workflow.nodes.forEach((node) => {
+    indegree.set(node.id, 0);
+    outgoing.set(node.id, []);
+  });
+  workflow.edges.forEach((edge) => {
+    indegree.set(edge.target, (indegree.get(edge.target) ?? 0) + 1);
+    outgoing.set(edge.source, [...(outgoing.get(edge.source) ?? []), edge.target]);
+  });
+
+  const queue = workflow.nodes.filter((node) => (indegree.get(node.id) ?? 0) === 0).map((node) => node.id);
+  queue.forEach((id) => ranks.set(id, 0));
+  while (queue.length > 0) {
+    const current = queue.shift()!;
+    const nextRank = (ranks.get(current) ?? 0) + 1;
+    for (const target of outgoing.get(current) ?? []) {
+      indegree.set(target, (indegree.get(target) ?? 1) - 1);
+      ranks.set(target, Math.max(ranks.get(target) ?? 0, nextRank));
+      if ((indegree.get(target) ?? 0) <= 0) {
+        queue.push(target);
+      }
+    }
+  }
+
+  const columns = new Map<number, WorkflowNode[]>();
+  workflow.nodes.forEach((node) => {
+    const rank = ranks.get(node.id) ?? 0;
+    columns.set(rank, [...(columns.get(rank) ?? []), node]);
+  });
+
+  const columnIndices = [...columns.keys()].sort((left, right) => left - right);
+  const columnWidths = new Map<number, number>();
+  columnIndices.forEach((columnIndex) => {
+    const width = Math.max(
+      ...(columns.get(columnIndex) ?? []).map((node) => estimateNodeSize(node).width),
+      220
+    );
+    columnWidths.set(columnIndex, width);
+  });
+
+  let currentX = 0;
+  const xPositions = new Map<number, number>();
+  columnIndices.forEach((columnIndex) => {
+    xPositions.set(columnIndex, currentX);
+    currentX += (columnWidths.get(columnIndex) ?? 220) + 68;
+  });
+
+  const currentStageWeight = stageWeight(topicStage);
+  const flowNodes = workflow.nodes.map((node) => {
+    const rank = ranks.get(node.id) ?? 0;
+    const columnNodes = columns.get(rank) ?? [];
+    const index = columnNodes.findIndex((entry) => entry.id === node.id);
+    const size = estimateNodeSize(node);
+    const y = columnNodes
+      .slice(0, index)
+      .reduce((sum, entry) => sum + estimateNodeSize(entry).height + 28, 0);
+    const nodeStageWeight = stageWeight(inferNodeStage(node));
+    const status: FlowStatus =
+      nodeStageWeight < currentStageWeight
+        ? "done"
+        : nodeStageWeight > currentStageWeight
+          ? "upcoming"
+          : "current";
+    const sourcePath = node.data.detail?.sourcePath ?? node.data.path ?? node.data.diffRef ?? null;
+    const color = getStatusColor(status, theme);
+
+    return {
+      id: node.id,
+      position: {
+        x: xPositions.get(rank) ?? 0,
+        y
+      },
+      type: "default",
+      data: {
+        label: (
+          <Stack spacing={0.75}>
+            <Typography variant="subtitle2" sx={{ fontWeight: 700 }}>
+              {node.data.label ?? node.id}
+            </Typography>
+            <Typography variant="caption" sx={{ color: "text.secondary" }}>
+              {sourcePath}
+            </Typography>
+          </Stack>
+        ),
+        title: node.data.label ?? node.id,
+        detail: node.data.detail ?? null,
+        sourcePath,
+        status
+      },
+      style: {
+        width: size.width,
+        minHeight: size.height,
+        borderRadius: 18,
+        border: `1px solid ${alpha(color, 0.42)}`,
+        background: `linear-gradient(180deg, ${alpha(color, 0.18)}, rgba(255,255,255,0.96))`,
+        boxShadow: `0 18px 36px ${alpha(color, 0.12)}`,
+        padding: 12
+      }
+    } as Node<FlowNodeData>;
+  });
+
+  const flowEdges: Edge[] = workflow.edges.map((edge) => ({
+    id: edge.id,
+    source: edge.source,
+    target: edge.target,
+    animated: false,
+    style: {
+      stroke: alpha(theme.palette.secondary.main, 0.35),
+      strokeWidth: 2
+    }
+  }));
+
+  return {
+    nodes: flowNodes,
+    edges: flowEdges
+  };
+}
+
+function getStatusColor(status: FlowStatus, theme: ReturnType<typeof useTheme>): string {
+  if (status === "done") {
+    return theme.palette.success.main;
+  }
+  if (status === "current") {
+    return theme.palette.primary.main;
+  }
+  return theme.palette.warning.main;
+}
+
+export default App;

\"2026-04-20T16:29:24Z\"\n  auto_mode: \"on\"\nreactflow:\n  node_id: \"proposal\"\n  node_type: \"doc\"\n  label: \"proposal.md\"\nstate:\n  summary: \"MUI 기반 dashboard 개편과 project category/flow UX 고도화 요구를 proposal로 정리한다.\"\n  next: \"pgg-plan\"\n---\n\n# Proposal\n\n## 1. 제목\n\ndashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement\n\n## 2. 왜 하는가\n\n- 현재 dashboard는 `apps/dashboard/src/App.tsx` 중심의 단일 화면 구조와 수제 CSS에 가까운 형태라서, 사용자가 요구한 Airframe Projects 계열의 운영형 dashboard 정보 구조를 담기 어렵다.\n- UI copy가 `App.tsx` 내부에 인라인으로 들어 있어 i18n을 별도 리소스로 확장하기 어렵고, MUI 기반 컴포넌트 시스템도 아직 적용되어 있지 않다.\n- 등록된 프로젝트를 카테고리로 관리하고 기본 카테고리를 지정하며 드래그 앤 드롭으로 재배치하는 기능은 현재 snapshot/registry 데이터 모델에 존재하지 않는다.\n- workflow 화면도 현재는 정적 노드 렌더링 수준이라 글자 길이에 따른 노드 크기 조절, 노드 간 자동 간격 보정, 진행 상태별 색상 구분, 10초 주기 상태 갱신, 노드 클릭 시 문서/ diff 상세 모달 표시 요구를 충족하지 못한다.\n- 특히 노드 상세 모달은 브라우저가 로컬 파일 시스템을 직접 읽을 수 없기 때문에, dashboard UI뿐 아니라 snapshot 생성 로직과 workflow 데이터 계약까지 함께 확장해야 한다.\n\n## 3. 무엇을 할 것인가\n\n- 디자인 기준은 사용자가 지정한 `https://airframe-react-lime.vercel.app/dashboards/projects`의 정보 밀도와 카드형 운영 레이아웃을 참고하되, 구현은 현재 repo의 React/Vite 구조 안에서 MUI 중심으로 재구성한다.\n- dashboard를 MUI `ThemeProvider`, layout, card, dialog, list, tabs, chip, form 계열 컴포넌트로 재구성하고 현재 하드코딩된 copy는 별도 i18n 모듈로 분리한다.\n- registry 기반 프로젝트 목록 위에 카테고리 모델을 추가해 카테고리 생성/수정/삭제, default 지정, 프로젝트-카테고리 배치, 드래그 앤 드롭 재정렬을 지원한다.\n- workflow 화면은 기존 `proposal/review/task/diff/test` 형식과 문서 path 규약은 유지하면서, 노드 크기 자동 측정, 자동 레이아웃, 상태별 색상, 10초 polling, 노드 상세 모달을 갖춘 형태로 고도화한다.\n- `packages/core`와 `packages/cli`의 snapshot 생성 로직을 확장해 category 메타데이터, workflow 상태 메타데이터, 상세 모달에 필요한 문서/ diff 콘텐츠 payload를 dashboard에서 사용할 수 있게 만든다.\n\n## 4. 범위\n\n### 포함\n\n- Airframe Projects 레퍼런스를 반영한 dashboard 정보 구조 재설계\n- MUI 필수 사용을 전제로 한 dashboard UI 컴포넌트 구조 개편\n- dashboard i18n 리소스 분리와 locale 접근 구조 정리\n- 프로젝트 카테고리 CRUD, default 카테고리 지정, 프로젝트 분류/이동, 드래그 앤 드롭 UX 정의\n- workflow 노드 자동 크기 조정, 자동 레이아웃, 상태 컬러링, 10초 polling, 상세 모달 요구 정의\n- category 및 workflow detail을 담을 registry/snapshot 스키마 확장 방향 정의\n\n### 제외\n\n- 이번 proposal 단계에서 실제 MUI 컴포넌트 구현\n- 사용자 인증, 서버 동기화, 멀티유저 협업, 권한 관리\n- arbitrary 파일 편집 기능이나 dashboard 내 문서 작성 기능\n- archive 전체 topic에 대한 과거 workflow 데이터 보정 작업\n- Airframe 템플릿 자체를 그대로 복제하거나 Bootstrap 의존성을 들여오는 작업\n\n## 5. 제약 사항\n\n- dashboard UI는 MUI를 필수로 사용해야 한다.\n- i18n은 `App.tsx` 내부 상수 유지 방식이 아니라 별도 파일/모듈로 분리되어야 한다.\n- 카테고리는 topic이 아니라 registry에 등록된 project를 분류하는 모델로 다뤄야 한다.\n- workflow는 기존 문서 구조와 path, diff 연결 방식을 유지해야 하며 표현 계층만 고도화해야 한다.\n- flow 상태 갱신은 React Query를 사용해 10초 간격 polling으로 처리해야 한다.\n- 노드 상세 모달은 `diff`, `md` 등 문서 타입별로 콘텐츠를 보여줄 수 있어야 하며, 이를 위해 snapshot 데이터 계약 확장이 필요하다.\n\n## 6. auto mode 처리\n\n- poggn auto mode: `on`\n- auto mode가 `on`이므로 구현 기본안은 proposal 단계에서 선결정한다.\n\n## 7. 기준안\n\n| 항목 | 기준안 | 상태 |\n|---|---|---|\n| 디자인 시스템 | Airframe Projects 화면의 카드형 운영 레이아웃을 참고하되 실제 구현은 MUI 토큰/컴포넌트로 재구성 | resolved |\n| 카테고리 저장 위치 | 전역 registry 또는 registry 연계 dashboard 메타데이터에 category/order/default/project mapping을 저장 | resolved |\n| 드래그 앤 드롭 | MUI 레이아웃 위에서 `@dnd-kit` 계열로 category 내/간 project 이동을 처리 | resolved |\n| flow 자동 배치 | React Flow는 유지하고, 가변 노드 크기와 간격 계산은 ELK 기반 자동 레이아웃으로 정리 | resolved |\n| 노드 상세 데이터 | dashboard client가 직접 파일을 읽지 않고 snapshot 생성 시 문서/ diff payload를 정규화해 함께 전달 | resolved |\n\n## 8. 성공 기준\n\n- plan 단계가 시작되기 전에 dashboard 개편 범위가 UI, 데이터 모델, workflow 렌더링, snapshot 확장까지 포함한다는 점이 명확해진다.\n- MUI 도입, i18n 분리, category CRUD/default/DnD, workflow 상태 시각화, 노드 상세 모달 요구가 빠짐없이 문서화된다.\n- 카테고리 저장 위치와 노드 상세 콘텐츠 전달 방식이 proposal 수준에서 고정되어 plan 단계의 구조적 재논의를 줄인다.\n- flow 고도화가 기존 workflow 형식을 바꾸는 작업이 아니라 기존 문서/ diff 규약을 유지한 표현 계층 업그레이드라는 점이 정리된다.\n\n## 9. 전문가 평가 요약\n\n- UX/UI 전문가: 레퍼런스는 layout 감각만 차용하고, 실제 제품 정보 구조는 MUI 기반 카드/패널/모달 단위로 재설계하는 방향이 적절하다.\n- 플랫폼 엔지니어: category CRUD와 노드 상세 모달은 UI 기능처럼 보이지만 실제로는 registry/snapshot schema 변경이 핵심이므로 proposal에서 같이 묶은 판단이 맞다.\n- 도메인 전문가: project 분류는 topic이 아니라 registry 프로젝트 단위로 해석해야 요구사항과 현재 dashboard 목적이 일치한다.\n\n## 10. 다음 단계\n\n`pgg-plan`에서 UI 구조, registry/snapshot schema, workflow renderer 개선을 분리한 spec/task로 전개\n",

+                    "content": "---\npgg:\n  topic: \"dashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement\"\n  stage: \"plan\"\n  status: \"reviewed\"\n  skill: \"pgg-plan\"\n  score: 93\n  updated_at: \"2026-04-20T16:31:00Z\"\nreactflow:\n  node_id: \"plan\"\n  node_type: \"doc\"\n  label: \"plan.md\"\nstate:\n  summary: \"dashboard 개편을 MUI shell, category snapshot, workflow viewer 개선 계획으로 분해한다.\"\n  next: \"pgg-code\"\n---\n\n# Plan\n\n## 목표\n\n- 현재 `apps/dashboard`를 MUI 기반 운영 dashboard로 재구성하고, registry 프로젝트 카테고리 관리와 workflow 시각화 고도화를 같은 제품 흐름 안에서 구현 가능하도록 계획을 확정한다.\n\n## 결정 사항\n\n- dashboard UI는 MUI를 기본 레이어로 사용하고, 기존 CSS 중심 구조는 MUI theme와 component composition 중심으로 재편한다.\n- dashboard copy는 화면 컴포넌트 내부 상수에서 분리해 locale 리소스 모듈로 관리한다.\n- project category 메타데이터는 registry와 같은 analyzer/snapshot 계층에서 관리하고, dashboard는 이를 편집하는 클라이언트가 된다.\n- drag and drop은 project를 category 내/간 이동하는 수준으로 제한하고, topic 단위 drag는 범위에서 제외한다.\n- workflow는 React Flow를 유지하되, ELK 기반 자동 레이아웃과 노드 크기 측정 계층을 추가한다.\n- 노드 상세 모달은 browser가 직접 파일을 읽지 않고 snapshot payload에 포함된 문서/ diff detail을 사용한다.\n\n## 접근 방식\n\n- `spec/ui/dashboard-shell-and-i18n.md`에서 MUI layout, navigation, card composition, locale 리소스 구조를 정의한다.\n- `spec/infra/project-category-snapshot.md`에서 registry category 모델, snapshot payload, CRUD/update 계약을 정의한다.\n- `spec/ui/workflow-visualization-detail.md`에서 React Flow 상태 색상, polling, 자동 크기/간격, detail modal UX를 정의한다.\n- `task.md`는 spec 경계에 맞춰 `shell/i18n`, `category data model`, `workflow viewer`, `integration/verification` 순서로 분해한다.\n\n## 단계별 실행\n\n- `apps/dashboard` 현 구조를 MUI 기반 shell, 좌측 project/category 영역, 중앙 workflow/overview 영역, 우측 detail/modal 계층으로 재편한다.\n- `packages/core` analyzer와 snapshot schema를 확장해 project categories, default category, project ordering, workflow node detail payload를 제공한다.\n- `packages/cli` dashboard snapshot 출력 경로는 유지하되 확장된 schema를 생성하도록 맞춘다.\n- workflow renderer는 React Query polling, ELK layout, 상태별 색상 토큰, 문서 타입별 detail modal을 포함하는 모듈로 재구성한다.\n- 구현 단계에서는 spec 순서대로 data layer를 먼저 고정하고, 그 위에 dashboard UI와 상호작용을 얹는다.\n\n## 완료 조건\n\n- `plan.md`, `task.md`, `spec/ui/*.md`, `spec/infra/*.md`, `reviews/plan.review.md`가 모두 생성되어 있다.\n- category 저장 모델과 snapshot schema 확장이 plan 단계에서 고정되어 구현 중 데이터 계약 재설계가 필요하지 않다.\n- MUI 전환, i18n 분리, category CRUD/default/DnD, workflow polling/detail modal이 task 단위로 분해되어 있다.\n- 구현 단계가 기존 workflow 형식 유지 조건을 어기지 않고 바로 시작될 수 있다.\n\n## 전문가 평가 요약\n\n- 소프트웨어 아키텍트: UI 개편과 데이터 계약 변경을 분리된 spec으로 나눈 판단이 적절하며, snapshot schema를 먼저 고정해야 후속 구현 충돌이 줄어든다.\n- 시니어 백엔드 엔지니어: category CRUD와 detail modal은 core analyzer와 dashboard client가 같은 schema를 공유해야 하므로 infra spec이 핵심이다.\n- 인프라/데브옵스 엔지니어: polling 주기와 snapshot 생성 방식이 로컬 도구 범위에서 제어 가능하며, 서버를 추가하지 않는 현재 구조와도 맞는다.\n",

+                    "content": "---\npgg:\n  topic: \"dashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement\"\n  stage: \"plan\"\n  status: \"reviewed\"\n  skill: \"pgg-plan\"\n  score: 93\n  updated_at: \"2026-04-20T16:31:00Z\"\nreactflow:\n  node_id: \"spec-dashboard-shell\"\n  node_type: \"doc\"\n  label: \"spec/ui/dashboard-shell-and-i18n.md\"\nstate:\n  summary: \"MUI dashboard shell, project/category 화면 구조, i18n 분리 원칙을 정의한다.\"\n  next: \"task.md 승인\"\n---\n\n# Dashboard Shell And I18n Spec\n\n## Goal\n\n- `apps/dashboard`를 MUI 기반 운영 dashboard shell로 재구성하고, project/category 관리 화면과 locale 리소스 구조를 일관되게 정의한다.\n\n## Tech Requirements\n\n- UI component layer는 MUI를 필수 사용한다.\n- theme는 MUI `ThemeProvider`와 공통 토큰 파일로 관리한다.\n- 기존 inline copy 객체는 locale 리소스 모듈로 이동한다.\n- dashboard의 async server-state는 TanStack Query, client selection/filter UI state는 Zustand를 유지한다.\n- drag and drop은 MUI layout 위에서 동작 가능한 라이브러리 계층으로 통합한다.\n\n## Layout\n\n- 상단 hero/header: 현재 프로젝트, generated 시각, quick actions를 담는다.\n- 좌측 rail/panel: project list와 category list를 함께 보여주고 category 선택, default 표시, CRUD entry를 제공한다.\n- 중앙 content: selected category의 project card list, selected project overview, workflow viewer를 배치한다.\n- 보조 panel 또는 modal: category form, node detail, error/empty state를 처리한다.\n- mobile에서는 drawer 중심, desktop에서는 multi-column card layout을 사용한다.\n\n## I18n Structure\n\n- locale 리소스는 `ko`, `en` 기준 별도 모듈 또는 리소스 파일로 분리한다.\n- key 네이밍은 `dashboard.shell.*`, `dashboard.category.*`, `dashboard.workflow.*`처럼 화면 책임 단위로 묶는다.\n- 현재 프로젝트의 language 설정을 기본 locale로 사용하되, dashboard 전체에서 동일한 dictionary를 참조해야 한다.\n- 컴포넌트 내부에 사용자 노출 문자열을 상수로 신규 추가하지 않는다.\n\n## Category UX\n\n- category 목록은 이름, project 개수, default 여부를 보여준다.\n- 사용자는 category 생성, 수정, 삭제를 할 수 있어야 한다.\n- default category는 정확히 하나여야 하며 삭제 전 다른 category로 재지정되어야 한다.\n- project card는 category column 또는 list 안에서 drag and drop 이동이 가능해야 한다.\n- drag and drop 결과는 snapshot refresh 이전에도 즉시 반영되는 optimistic UI를 제공할 수 있어야 한다.\n\n## Non-Requirements\n\n- 인증 기반 개인화 레이아웃 저장\n- category별 권한 관리\n- topic 문서 직접 편집\n",
+                    "contentType": "text/markdown",

+                  }

+                    "content": "---\npgg:\n  topic: \"dashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement\"\n  stage: \"plan\"\n  status: \"reviewed\"\n  skill: \"pgg-plan\"\n  score: 93\n  updated_at: \"2026-04-20T16:31:00Z\"\nreactflow:\n  node_id: \"spec-category-snapshot\"\n  node_type: \"doc\"\n  label: \"spec/infra/project-category-snapshot.md\"\nstate:\n  summary: \"project category metadata와 dashboard snapshot 확장 계약을 정의한다.\"\n  next: \"task.md 승인\"\n---\n\n# Project Category Snapshot Spec\n\n## Goal\n\n- project category CRUD와 workflow detail modal이 사용할 수 있는 registry/analyzer/snapshot 데이터 계약을 정의한다.\n\n## Data Model\n\n- registry 계층 또는 registry 연계 metadata는 category 배열을 가져야 한다.\n- category는 `id`, `name`, `isDefault`, `order`, `projectIds`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`를 최소 필드로 가진다.\n- 각 registered project는 0개 이상 category에 속할 수 있지만, dashboard 기본 UX에서는 정확히 1개의 primary category를 가진 것으로 표시한다.\n- category 삭제 시 포함 project는 default category로 재배치된다.\n\n## Snapshot Contract\n\n- `DashboardSnapshot`은 project 목록 외에 category metadata 또는 project별 category projection을 포함해야 한다.\n- `ProjectSnapshot` 또는 상위 snapshot은 dashboard가 category별 grouping과 ordering을 복원할 수 있는 정보를 가져야 한다.\n- topic workflow node는 선택적으로 `detail` payload를 가질 수 있어야 한다.\n- `detail` payload는 `kind`, `title`, `sourcePath`, `content`, `contentType`, `updatedAt`을 포함한다.\n- `diff` 문서는 raw diff text, markdown 문서는 raw markdown text를 payload로 전달한다.\n\n## Analyzer Rules\n\n- dashboard client는 로컬 파일 직접 접근 대신 analyzer가 만든 snapshot payload만 사용한다.\n- workflow detail 수집은 `proposal.md`, `plan.md`, `task.md`, `state/current.md`, `reviews/*.md`, `implementation/diffs/*.diff`, `spec/*/*.md`, `qa/*.md`를 우선 대상으로 한다.\n- 파일이 누락되면 detail payload는 null일 수 있으며, UI는 unavailable 상태를 처리해야 한다.\n- 기존 topic summary, workflow path, stage 파싱 규칙은 유지한다.\n\n## Update Rules\n\n- category CRUD 결과는 registry 또는 metadata 저장소에 즉시 반영되어 다음 snapshot 생성에 포함되어야 한다.\n- snapshot 생성기는 category 정보와 project 분석 결과를 같은 기준 시각으로 직렬화해야 한다.\n- 기존 프로젝트에 category metadata가 없으면 default category 하나를 생성한 것처럼 해석해야 한다.\n\n## Non-Requirements\n\n- 원격 DB 저장\n- category 히스토리/감사 로그\n- 대용량 diff 스트리밍 최적화\n",
+                    "contentType": "text/markdown",
+                    "updatedAt": "2026-04-20T16:33:40.963Z"
+                  }
+                }
+              },
+              {
+                "id": "spec-workflow-detail",
+                "type": "document",
+                "position": {
+                  "x": 320,
+                  "y": 640
+                },
+                "data": {
+                  "label": "spec/ui/workflow-visualization-detail.md",
+                  "path": "poggn/active/dashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement/spec/ui/workflow-visualization-detail.md",
+                  "stage": "plan",
+                  "detail": {
+                    "kind": "markdown",
+                    "title": "spec/ui/workflow-visualization-detail.md",
+                    "sourcePath": "poggn/active/dashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement/spec/ui/workflow-visualization-detail.md",
+                    "content": "---\npgg:\n  topic: \"dashboard-mui-category-flow-enhancement\"\n  stage: \"plan\"\n  status: \"reviewed\"\n  skill: \"pgg-plan\"\n  score: 93\n  updated_at: \"2026-04-20T16:31:00Z\"\nreactflow:\n  node_id: \"spec-workflow-detail\"\n  node_type: \"doc\"\n  label: \"spec/ui/workflow-visualization-detail.md\"\nstate:\n  summary: \"workflow 자동 레이아웃, 상태 색상, polling, detail modal 요구를 정의한다.\"\n  next: \"task.md 승인\"\n---\n\n# Workflow Visualization Detail Spec\n\n## Goal\n\n- 기존 `workflow.reactflow.json` 형식과 문서 연결을 유지하면서, dashboard workflow viewer를 상태 인지형 운영 뷰로 고도화한다.\n\n## Rendering Requirements\n\n- workflow 시각화는 계속 React Flow를 사용한다.\n- 노드 너비/높이는 label과 보조 메타데이터 길이에 맞게 자동 측정되어야 한다.\n- 노드 간 간격은 자동 계산되어 서로 겹치지 않아야 한다.\n- 자동 레이아웃은 기존 edge 방향성과 stage 흐름을 해치지 않아야 한다.\n- 문서 node, review node, test node, fileDiff node는 타입별 기본 시각 차이를 유지할 수 있어야 한다.\n\n## State Semantics\n\n- 진행 중인 current node는 활성 색상으로 표시한다.\n- 완료된 upstream node는 완료 색상으로 표시한다.\n- 아직 진행 전인 downstream node는 예정 색상으로 표시한다.\n- 상태 판단은 topic의 현재 stage와 workflow graph 순서를 바탕으로 analyzer 또는 UI helper가 계산한다.\n\n## Refresh And Interaction\n\n- workflow 관련 snapshot 조회는 TanStack Query로 10초 polling을 사용한다.\n- polling 중에도 현재 선택 노드와 modal 상태는 불필요하게 초기화되지 않아야 한다.\n- 노드 클릭 시 detail modal이 열리고, 문서 타입에 따라 markdown viewer 또는 diff viewer를 표시한다.\n- detail이 없는 노드는 path 정보와 unavailable 메시지를 제공한다.\n\n## Modal Requirements\n\n- modal title은 노드 label과 문서 유형을 함께 표시한다.\n- markdown은 원문 보존을 우선하고, diff는 추가/삭제 구분이 가능한 viewer를 사용한다.\n- 긴 콘텐츠는 스크롤 가능해야 하고, desktop/mobile 모두에서 usable 해야 한다.\n- modal은 읽기 전용이며 파일 수정 기능은 제공하지 않는다.\n\n## Non-Requirements\n\n- workflow 편집\n- edge 직접 수정\n- 실시간 collaborative cursor\n",
+                    "contentType": "text/markdown",
+                    "updatedAt": "2026-04-20T16:33:40.983Z"
+                  }

\"./templates.js\";\n+\n+export const PGG_VERSION = \"0.1.0\";\n+export const MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH = \".pgg/project.json\";\n+export const REGISTRY_RELATIVE_PATH = \".pgg/registry.json\";\n+\n+export type PggLanguage = TemplateLanguage;\n+export type PggAutoMode = TemplateAutoMode;\n+export type PggProvider = TemplateProvider;\n+\n+export interface ManagedFileRecord {\n+  path: string;\n+  checksum: string;\n+  executable: boolean;\n+}\n+\n+export interface ProjectManifest {\n+  schemaVersion: number;\n+  projectName: string;\n+  rootDir: string;\n+  provider: PggProvider;\n+  language: PggLanguage;\n+  autoMode: PggAutoMode;\n+  installedVersion: string;\n+  updatedAt: string;\n+  dashboard: {\n+    defaultPort: number;\n+  };\n+  managedFiles: ManagedFileRecord[];\n+}\n+\n+export interface RegistryProjectEntry {\n+  id: string;\n+  name: string;\n+  rootDir: string;\n+  provider: PggProvider;\n+  language: PggLanguage;\n+ score: number | null;\n+  blockingIssues: string | null;\n+  status: string | null;\n+  workflow: WorkflowDocument | null;\n+  health: \"ok\" | \"partial\";\n+}\n+\n+export interface WorkflowNodeData {\n+  label?: string;\n+  path?: string;\n+  stage?: string;\n+  crud?: string;\n+  diffRef?: string;\n+}\n+\n+export interface WorkflowNode {\n+  id: string;\n+  type: string;\n+  position: {\n+    x: number;\n+    y: number;\n+  };\n+  data: WorkflowNodeData;\n+}\n+\n+export interface WorkflowEdge {\n+  id: string;\n+  source: string;\n+  target: string;\n+}\n+\n+export interface hasCodex: boolean;\n+  hasPoggn: boolean;\n+  activeTopics: TopicSummary[];\n+  archivedTopics: TopicSummary[];\n+}\n+\n+export interface DashboardSnapshot {\n+  generatedAt: string;\n+  currentProjectId: string | null;\n+  projects: ProjectSnapshot[];\n+}\n+\n+export interface InitOptions {\n+  provider?: PggProvider;\n+  language?: PggLanguage;\n+  autoMode?: PggAutoMode;\n+}\n+\n+function checksum(value: string): string {\n+  return createHash(\"sha256\").update(value).digest(\"hex\");\n+}\n+\n+function nowIso(): string {\n+  return new Date().toISOString();\n+}\n+\n+function stableProjectId(rootDir: string): string {\n+  const base = path.basename(rootDir).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\") || \"project\";\n+  return `${base}-${checksum(rootDir).slice(0, 8)}`;\n+}\n+\n+function sanitizeFileName(value: string): string {\n+  return value.replace(/[\\\\/.: ]+/g, \"_\");\n+}\n+\n+async function ensureParentDir(filePath: string): Promise<void> {\n+  await mkdir(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });\n+}\n+\n+async function readTextIfExists(filePath: string): Promise<string | null> {\n+  try {\n+    return await readFile(filePath, \"utf8\");\n+  } catch {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+async function writeTextFile(filePath: string, content: string): Promise<void> {\n+  await ensureParentDir(filePath);\n+  await writeFile(filePath, content, \"utf8\");\n+}\n+\n+function manifestPath(rootDir: string): string {\n+  return path.join(rootDir, MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH);\n+}\n+\n+function registryPath(): string {\n+  return path.join(os.homedir(), REGISTRY_RELATIVE_PATH);\n+}\n+\n+function buildTemplateInput(manifest: ProjectManifest): TemplateInput {\n+  return {\n+    language: manifest.language,\n+    autoMode: manifest.autoMode,\n+    provider: manifest.provider,\n+    version: manifest.installedVersion\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export function createProjectManifest(rootDir: string, options: InitOptions = {}): ProjectManifest {\n+  return {\n+    schemaVersion: 1,\n+    projectName: path.basename(rootDir),\n+    rootDir,\n+    provider: options.provider ?? \"codex\",\n+    language: options.language ?? \"ko\",\n+    autoMode: options.autoMode ?? \"on\",\n+    installedVersion: PGG_VERSION,\n+    updatedAt: nowIso(),\n+    dashboard: {\n+      defaultPort: 4173\n+    },\n+    managedFiles: []\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function loadProjectManifest(rootDir: string): Promise<ProjectManifest | null> {\n+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(manifestPath(rootDir));\n+  if (!raw) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  return JSON.parse(raw) as ProjectManifest;\n+}\n+\n+export async function saveProjectManifest(rootDir: string, manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<void> {\n+  const target = manifestPath(rootDir);\n+  await writeTextFile(target, `${JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+}\n+\n+export async function loadGlobalRegistry(): Promise<GlobalRegistry> {\n+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(registryPath());\n+  if (!raw) {\n+    return {\n+      version: 1,\n+      projects: []\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  return JSON.parse(raw) as GlobalRegistry;\n+}\n+\n+export async function saveGlobalRegistry(registry: GlobalRegistry): Promise<void> {\n+  const target = registryPath();\n+  await writeTextFile(target, `${JSON.stringify(registry, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+}\n+\n+export async function syncProject(rootDir: string, manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const priorManaged = new Map(manifest.managedFiles.map((entry) => [entry.path, entry]));\n+  const templates = buildGeneratedFiles(buildTemplateInput(manifest));\n+  const created: string[] = [];\n+  const updated: string[] = [];\n+  const unchanged: string[] = [];\n+  const conflicts: SyncConflict[] = [];\n+  const nextManaged: ManagedFileRecord[] = [];\n+  const timestamp = nowIso();\n+\n+  for (const template of templates) {\n+    const target = path.join(rootDir, template.path);\n+    const current = await readTextIfExists(target);\n+    const nextChecksum = checksum(template.content);\n+    const previousManaged = priorManaged.get(template.path);\n+\n+    if (\n+      current !== null &&\n+      previousManaged &&\n+      checksum(current) !== previousManaged.checksum &&\n+      current !== template.content\n+    ) {\n+      const backupPath = path.join(\n+        rootDir,\n+        \".pgg\",\n+        \"backups\",\n+        `${timestamp.replaceAll(\":\", \"-\")}-${sanitizeFileName(template.path)}`\n+      );\n+      await writeTextFile(backupPath, current);\n+      conflicts.push({\n+        path: template.path,\n+        backupPath: path.relative(rootDir, backupPath)\n+      });\n+    }\n+\n+    if (current === null) {\n+      await writeTextFile(target, template.content);\n+      created.push(template.path);\n+    } else if (current !== template.content) {\n+      await writeTextFile(target, template.content);\n+      updated.push(template.path);\n+    } else {\n+      unchanged.push(template.path);\n+    }\n+\n+    if (template.executable) {\n+      await chmod(target, 0o755);\n+    }\n+\n+    nextManaged.push({\n+      path: template.path,\n+      checksum: nextChecksum,\n+      executable: template.executable ?? false\n+    });\n+  }\n+\n+  const nextManifest: ProjectManifest = {\n+    ...manifest,\n+    installedVersion: PGG_VERSION,\n+    updatedAt: timestamp,\n+    managedFiles: nextManaged\n+  };\n+\n+  await saveProjectManifest(rootDir, nextManifest);\n+\n+  return {\n+    manifest: nextManifest,\n+    created,\n+    updated,\n+    unchanged,\n+    conflicts\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function registerProject(manifest: ProjectManifest): Promise<GlobalRegistry> {\n+  const registry = await loadGlobalRegistry();\n+  const nextEntry: RegistryProjectEntry = {\n+    id: stableProjectId(manifest.rootDir),\n+    name: manifest.projectName,\n+    rootDir: manifest.rootDir,\n+    provider: manifest.provider,\n+    language: manifest.language,\n+    autoMode: manifest.autoMode,\n+    lastOpenedAt: nowIso()\n+  };\n+\n+  const projects = registry.projects.filter((entry) => entry.rootDir !== manifest.rootDir);\n+  projects.unshift(nextEntry);\n+\n+  const nextRegistry: GlobalRegistry = {\n+    ...registry,\n+    projects\n+  };\n+\n+  await saveGlobalRegistry(nextRegistry);\n+  return nextRegistry;\n+}\n+\n+export async function initializeProject(rootDir: string, options: InitOptions = {}): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = createProjectManifest(rootDir, options);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, manifest);\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+async function requireManifest(rootDir: string): Promise<ProjectManifest> {\n+  const manifest = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);\n+  if (!manifest) {\n+    throw new Error(\"Project is not initialized. Run `pgg init` first.\");\n+  }\n+\n+  return manifest;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateProject(rootDir: string): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, manifest);\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateProjectLanguage(rootDir: string, language: PggLanguage): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, { ...manifest, language });\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+export async function updateProjectAutoMode(rootDir: string, autoMode: PggAutoMode): Promise<SyncResult> {\n+  const manifest = await requireManifest(rootDir);\n+  const syncResult = await syncProject(rootDir, { ...manifest, autoMode });\n+  await registerProject(syncResult.manifest);\n+  return syncResult;\n+}\n+\n+function parseMarkdownSection(markdown: string, title: string): string | null {\n+  const escaped = title.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n+  const pattern = new RegExp(`## ${escaped}\\\\n\\\\n([\\\\s\\\\S]*?)(?=\\\\n## |$)`);\n+  const match = markdown.match(pattern);\n+  if (!match?.[1]) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  return match[1].trim();\n+}\n+\n+function parseKeyValue(markdown: string, key: string): string | null {\n+  const escaped = key.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\\]\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n+  const pattern = new RegExp(`^[ \\\\t]*${escaped}:\\\\s*\"?([^\"\\\\n]+)\"?`, \"m\");\n+  const match = markdown.match(pattern);\n+  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? null;\n+}\n+\n+function parseScore(markdown: string): number | null {\n+  const section = parseMarkdownSection(markdown, \"Last Expert Score\");\n+  if (!section) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  const match = section.match(/score:\\s*([0-9]+)/);\n+  return match ? Number(match[1]) : null;\n+}\n+\n+function parseBlockingIssues(markdown: string): string | null {\n+  const section = parseMarkdownSection(markdown, \"Last Expert Score\");\n+  if (!section) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  const match = section.match(/blocking issues:\\s*(.+)/);\n+  return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? null;\n+}\n+\n+async function readWorkflow(filePath: string): Promise<WorkflowDocument | null> {\n+  const raw = await readTextIfExists(filePath);\n+  if (!raw) {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+\n+  try {\n+    return JSON.parse(raw) as WorkflowDocument;\n+  } catch {\n+    return null;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+async function listTopicSummaries(rootDir: string, bucket: \"active\" | \"archive\"): Promise<TopicSummary[]> {\n+  const bucketDir = path.join(rootDir, \"poggn\", bucket);\n+  const entries = await readdir(bucketDir, { withFileTypes: true }).catch(() => []);\n+  const topics = entries.filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory()).sort((left, right) => left.name.localeCompare(right.name));\n+  const result: TopicSummary[] = [];\n+\n+  for (const entry of topics) {\n+    const topicDir = path.join(bucketDir, entry.name);\n+    const statePath = path.join(topicDir, \"state\", \"current.md\");\n+    const proposalPath = path.join(topicDir, \"proposal.md\");\n+    const stateMarkdown = await readTextIfExists(statePath);\n+    const proposalMarkdown = await readTextIfExists(proposalPath);\n+    const workflow = await readWorkflow(path.join(topicDir, \"workflow.reactflow.json\"));\n+    const stage = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, \"Current Stage\") : parseKeyValue(proposalMarkdown ?? \"\", \"stage\");\n+    const goal = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, \"Goal\") : null;\n+    const nextAction = stateMarkdown ? parseMarkdownSection(stateMarkdown, \"Next Action\") : null;\n+    const score = stateMarkdown ? parseScore(stateMarkdown) : null;\n+    const blockingIssues = stateMarkdown ? parseBlockingIssues(stateMarkdown) : null;\n+    const status = proposalMarkdown ? parseKeyValue(proposalMarkdown, \"status\") : null;\n+\n+    result.push({\n+      name: entry.name,\n+      bucket,\n+      stage,\n+      goal,\n+      nextAction,\n+      score,\n+      blockingIssues,\n+      status,\n+      workflow,\n+      health: stateMarkdown && workflow ? \"ok\" : \"partial\"\n+    });\n+  }\n+\n+  return result;\n+}\n+\n+export async function analyzeProject(rootDir: string, registered = false): Promise<ProjectSnapshot> {\n+  const missingRoot = !(await stat(rootDir).then(() => true).catch(() => false));\n+  if (missingRoot) {\n+    return {\n+      id: stableProjectId(rootDir),\n+      name: path.basename(rootDir),\n+      rootDir,\n+      registered,\n+      missingRoot: true,\n+      provider: \"codex\",\n+      language: \"ko\",\n+      autoMode: \"on\",\n+      installedVersion: null,\n+      hasAgents: false,\n+      hasCodex: false,\n+      hasPoggn: false,\n+      activeTopics: [],\n+      archivedTopics: []\n+    };\n+  }\n+\n+  const manifest = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);\n+  const activeTopics = await listTopicSummaries(rootDir, \"active\");\n+  const archivedTopics = await listTopicSummaries(rootDir, \"archive\");\n+\n+  return {\n+    id: stableProjectId(rootDir),\n+    name: manifest?.projectName ?? path.basename(rootDir),\n+    rootDir,\n+    registered,\n+    missingRoot: false,\n+    provider: manifest?.provider ?? \"codex\",\n+    language: manifest?.language ?? \"ko\",\n+    autoMode: manifest?.autoMode ?? \"on\",\n+    installedVersion: manifest?.installedVersion ?? null,\n+    hasAgents: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, \"AGENTS.md\")),\n+    hasCodex: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, \".codex\")),\n+    hasPoggn: existsSync(path.join(rootDir, \"poggn\")),\n+    activeTopics,\n+    archivedTopics\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export async function buildDashboardSnapshot(currentRootDir: string): Promise<DashboardSnapshot> {\n+  const registry = await loadGlobalRegistry();\n+  const dedupedPaths = new Map<string, boolean>();\n+  dedupedPaths.set(currentRootDir, registry.projects.some((entry) => entry.rootDir === currentRootDir));\n+  for (const entry of registry.projects) {\n+    if (!dedupedPaths.has(entry.rootDir)) {\n+      dedupedPaths.set(entry.rootDir, true);\n+    }\n+  }\n+\n+  const projects: ProjectSnapshot[] = [];\n+  for (const [rootDir, registered] of dedupedPaths.entries()) {\n+    projects.push(await analyzeProject(rootDir, registered));\n+  }\n+\n+  const currentProject = projects.find((project) => path.resolve(project.rootDir) === path.resolve(currentRootDir)) ?? null;\n+\n+  return {\n+    generatedAt: nowIso(),\n+    currentProjectId: currentProject?.id ?? null,\n+    projects\n+  };\n+}\n+\n+export function findWorkspaceRoot(startDir: string): string | null {\n+  let cursor = path.resolve(startDir);\n+\n+  while (true) {\n+    const candidate = path.join(cursor, \"pnpm-workspace.yaml\");\n+    if (existsSync(candidate)) {\n+      return cursor;\n+    }\n+\n+    const parent = path.dirname(cursor);\n+    if (parent === cursor) {\n+      return null;\n+    }\n+\n+    cursor = parent;\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+export async function writeDashboardSnapshotFile(filePath: string, snapshot: DashboardSnapshot): Promise<void> {\n+  await writeTextFile(filePath, `${JSON.stringify(snapshot, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+}\n",

agentsMd(input: TemplateInput): string {\n+  if (input.language === \"ko\") {\n+    return lines([\n+      \"# AGENTS.md\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"## Codex 전용 작업 원칙\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"- 모든 작업은 `.codex/add/WOKR-FLOW.md`를 따른다.\",\n+      \"- 모든 topic은 `poggn/active/<topic>` 안에서만 진행한다.\",\n+      \"- 구현 전에는 반드시 `proposal.md`, `plan.md`, `task.md`를 확인한다.\",\n+      \"- 구현 단계에서는 \"- 검증이 통과된 topic은 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동한다.\",\n+      \"- archive 처리된 topic은 다시 active로 되돌리지 않는다.\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"## Skill Flow\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"1. `pgg-add`\",\n+      \"2. `pgg-plan`\",\n+      \"3. `pgg-code`\",\n+      \"4. `pgg-qa`\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"## 금지\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"- `proposal.md`, `plan.md`, `task.md` 없이 구현하지 않는다.\",\n+      \"- auto mode가 `off`일 때 불확실한 요구사항을 임의 확정하지 않는다.\",\n+      \"- 전체 파일 내용을 불필요하게 다음 단계에 전달하지 않는다.\",\n+      \"- diff로 충분한 경우 전체 파일을 복사하지 않는다.\"\n+    ]);\n+  }\n+\n+  return lines([\n+    \"# AGENTS.md\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Codex Working Rules\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- Follow `.codex/add/WOKR-FLOW.md` for every task.\",\n+    \"- Work on every topic only inside `poggn/active/<topic>`.\",\n+    \"- Read -0,0 +1,250 @@\n+#!/usr/bin/env node\n+import { createInterface } from \"node:readline/promises\";\n+import { spawn } from \"node:child_process\";\n+import { stdin as input, stdout as output } from \"node:process\";\n+import path from \"node:path\";\n+import {\n+  buildDashboardSnapshot,\n+  findWorkspaceRoot,\n+  initializeProject,\n+  loadProjectManifest,\n+  MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH,\n+  type \"update\" | \"lang\" | \"auto\" | \"dashboard\";\n+\n+interface ParsedArgs {\n+  command: CommandName | null;\n+  options: Record<string, string | boolean>;\n+}\n+\n+function parseArgs(argv: string[]): ParsedArgs {\n+  const [commandToken, ...rest] = argv;\n+  const command = ([\"init\", \"update\", \"lang\", \"auto\", \"dashboard\"].includes(commandToken ?? \"\")\n+    ? commandToken\n+    : null) as CommandName | null;\n+  const options: Record<string, string | boolean> = {};\n+\n+  for (let index = 0; index < rest.length; index += 1) {\n+    const token = rest[index];\n+    if (!token?.startsWith(\"--\")) {\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+\n+    const [rawKey, inlineValue] = token.slice(2).split(\"=\");\n+    if (!rawKey) {\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+\n+    const key = rawKey;\n+    if (inlineValue !== undefined) {\n+      options[key] = inlineValue;\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+\n+    const next = rest[index + 1];\n+    if (next && !next.startsWith(\"--\")) {\n+      options[key] = next;\n+      index += 1;\n+      continue;\n+    }\n+\n+    options[key] = true;\n+  }\n+\n+  return { command, options };\n+}\n+\n+async function choose<T extends string>(question: string, options: Array<{ value: T; label: string }>): Promise<T> {\n+  if (!process.stdin.isTTY) {\n+    throw new Error(`${question} requires an interactive terminal or an explicit flag.`);\n+  }\n+\n+  const rl = createInterface({ input, output });\n+  output.write(`${question}\\n`);\n+  options.forEach((option, index) => {\n+    output.write(`  ${index + 1}. ${option.label}\\n`);\n+  });\n+\n+  while (true) {\n+    const answer = (await rl.question(\"> \")).trim();\n+    const byIndex = Number(answer);\n+    if (Number.isInteger(byIndex) && byIndex >= 1 && byIndex <= options.length) {\n+      rl.close();\n+      return options[byIndex - 1]!.value;\n+    }\n+\n+    const byValue = options.find((option) => option.value === answer);\n+    if (byValue) {\n+      rl.close();\n+      return byValue.value;\n+    }\n+  }\n+}\n+\n+function printHelp(): void {\n+  output.write(\n+    [\n+      \"Usage: pgg <command> [options]\",\n+      \"\",\n+      \"Commands:\",\n+      \"  pgg init [--cwd <dir>] [--provider codex] [--lang ko|en] [--auto on|off]\",\n+      \"  pgg update [--cwd <dir>]\",\n+      \"  pgg lang [--cwd <dir>] [--value ko|en]\",\n+      \"  pgg auto [--cwd <dir>] [--value on|off]\",\n+      \"  pgg dashboard [--cwd <dir>] [--host 127.0.0.1] [--port 4173] [--snapshot-only]\",\n+      \"\"\n+    ].join(\"\\n\")\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+function resolveRoot(options: Record<string, string | boolean>): string {\n+  const raw = typeof options.cwd === \"string\" ? options.cwd : process.cwd();\n+  return path.resolve(raw);\n+}\n+\n+function formatSyncResult(result: {\n+  created: string[];\n+  updated: string[];\n+  unchanged: string[];\n+  conflicts: Array<{ path: string; backupPath: string }>;\n+}): string {\n+  return JSON.stringify(\n+    {\n+      created: result.created.length,\n+      updated: result.updated.length,\n+      unchanged: result.unchanged.length,\n+      conflicts: result.conflicts\n+    },\n+    null,\n+    2\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+async function run(): Promise<void> {\n+  const { command, options } = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));\n+  if (!command) {\n+    printHelp();\n+    process.exitCode = 1;\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  const rootDir = resolveRoot(options);\n+\n+  if (command === \"init\") {\n+    const providerValue =\n+      typeof options.provider === \"string\"\n+        ? options.provider\n+        : await choose(\"Choose the initial provider\", [\n+            { value: \"codex\", label: \"Codex (recommended)\" },\n+            { value: \"cancel\", label: \"Cancel\" }\n+          ]);\n+\n+    if (providerValue === \"cancel\") {\n+      output.write('{\"status\":\"cancelled\"}\\n');\n+      return;\n+    }\n+\n+    const provider = providerValue as \"codex\";\n+    const language = (typeof options.lang === \"string\" ? options.lang : \"ko\") as PggLanguage;\n+    const autoMode = (typeof options.auto === \"string\" ? options.auto : \"on\") as PggAutoMode;\n+    const existing = await loadProjectManifest(rootDir);\n+    if (existing) {\n+      output.write(\n+        JSON.stringify(\n+          {\n+            status: \"already_initialized\",\n+            manifest: path.join(rootDir, MANIFEST_RELATIVE_PATH)\n+          },\n+          null,\n+          2\n+        ) + \"\\n\"\n+      );\n+      return;\n+    }\n+\n+    const result = await initializeProject(rootDir, {\n+      provider,\n+      language,\n+      autoMode\n+    });\n+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\\n`);\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (command === \"update\") {\n+    const result = await updateProject(rootDir);\n+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\\n`);\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (command === \"lang\") {\n+    const language =\n+      (typeof options.value === \"string\"\n+        ? options.value\n+        : await choose(\"Choose project language\", [\n+            { value: \"ko\", label: \"Korean\" },\n+            { value: \"en\", label: \"English\" }\n+          ])) as PggLanguage;\n+\n+    const result = await updateProjectLanguage(rootDir, language);\n+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\\n`);\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (command === \"auto\") {\n+    const autoMode =\n+      (typeof options.value === \"string\"\n+        ? options.value\n+        : await choose(\"Choose auto mode\", [\n+            { value: \"on\", label: \"on\" },\n+            { value: \"off\", label: \"off\" }\n+          ])) as PggAutoMode;\n+\n+    const result = await updateProjectAutoMode(rootDir, autoMode);\n+    output.write(`${formatSyncResult(result)}\\n`);\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  const host = typeof options.host === \"string\" ? options.host : \"127.0.0.1\";\n+  const port = Number(typeof options.port === \"string\" ? options.port : \"4173\");\n+  const snapshot = await buildDashboardSnapshot(rootDir);\n+  const workspaceRoot = findWorkspaceRoot(rootDir) ?? findWorkspaceRoot(path.dirname(new URL(import.meta.url).pathname));\n+  const snapshotPath = workspaceRoot\n+    ? path.join(workspaceRoot, \"apps\", \"dashboard\", \"public\", \"dashboard-data.json\")\n+    : path.join(rootDir, \".pgg\", \"dashboard-data.json\");\n+  await writeDashboardSnapshotFile(snapshotPath, snapshot);\n+\n+  if (options[\"snapshot-only\"]) {\n+    output.write(`${JSON.stringify({ snapshot: snapshotPath }, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+    return;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (!workspaceRoot) {\n+    throw new Error(\"Dashboard workspace root was not found. Use --snapshot-only to export data only.\");\n+  }\n+\n+  const child = spawn(\n+    \"pnpm\",\n+    [\"--dir\", workspaceRoot, \"--filter\", \"@pgg/dashboard\", \"dev\", \"--\", \"--host\", host, \"--port\", String(port)],\n+    {\n+      stdio: \"inherit\"\n+    }\n+  );\n+\n+  child.on(\"exit\", (code) => {\n+    process.exitCode = code ?? 0;\n+  });\n+}\n+\n+run().catch((error: unknown) => {\n+  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n+  output.write(`${JSON.stringify({ error: message }, null, 2)}\\n`);\n+  process.exitCode = 1;\n+});\n",
+                    "contentType": "text/x-diff",

+                  }

+                    "content": "diff --git a/apps/dashboard/src/App.tsx b/apps/dashboard/src/App.tsx\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..d448956\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/apps/dashboard/src/App.tsx\n@@ -0,0 +1,442 @@\n+import { useQuery } from \"@tanstack/react-query\";\n+import { Background, Controls, MiniMap, ReactFlow } from \"@xyflow/react\";\n+import { startTransition, useDeferredValue, useEffect } from \"react\";\n+import { create } from \"zustand\";\n+\n+type WorkflowNodeData = {\n+  label?: string;\n+  path?: string;\n+  stage?: string;\n+  crud?: string;\n+  diffRef?: string;\n+};\n+\n+type WorkflowNode = {\n+  id: string;\n+  type: string;\n+  position: {\n+    x: number;\n+    y: number;\n+  };\n+  data: WorkflowNodeData;\n+};\n+\n+type WorkflowEdge = {\n+  id: string;\n+  source: string;\n+  target: string;\n+};\n+\n+type WorkflowDocument = {\n+  topic: string;\n+  nodes: WorkflowNode[];\n+  edges: WorkflowEdge[];\n+};\n+\n+type TopicSummary = {\n+  name: string;\n+  bucket: \"active\" | \"archive\";\n+  stage: string | null;\n+  goal: string | null;\n+  nextAction: string | null;\n+  score: number | null;\n+  blockingIssues: string | null;\n+  status: string | null;\n+  workflow: WorkflowDocument | null;\n+  health: \"ok\" | \"partial\";\n+};\n+\n+type ProjectSnapshot = {\n+  id: string;\n+  name: string;\n+  rootDir: string;\n+  registered: boolean;\n+  missingRoot: boolean;\n+  provider: \"codex\";\n+  language: \"ko\" | \"en\";\n+  autoMode: \"on\" | \"off\";\n+  installedVersion: string | null;\n+  hasAgents: boolean;\n+  hasCodex: boolean;\n+  hasPoggn: boolean;\n+  activeTopics: TopicSummary[];\n+  archivedTopics: TopicSummary[];\n+};\n+\n+type DashboardSnapshot = {\n+  generatedAt: string;\n+  currentProjectId: string | null;\n+  projects: ProjectSnapshot[];\n+};\n+\n+type DashboardStore = {\n+  selectedProjectId: string | null;\n+  selectedTopicKey: string | null;\n+  topicFilter: string;\n+  setSelectedProjectId: (value: string | null) => void;\n+  setSelectedTopicKey: (value: string | null) => void;\n+  setTopicFilter: (value: string) => void;\n+};\n+\n+const useDashboardStore = create<DashboardStore>((set) => ({\n+  selectedProjectId: null,\n+  selectedTopicKey: null,\n+  topicFilter: \"\",\n+  setSelectedProjectId: (value) => set({ selectedProjectId: value }),\n+  setSelectedTopicKey: (value) => set({ selectedTopicKey: value }),\n+  setTopicFilter: (value) => set({ topicFilter: value })\n+}));\n+\n+const copy = {\n+  ko: {\n+    eyebrow: \"project operating board\",\n+    title: \"pgg dashboard\",\n+    empty: \"등록된 프로젝트가 없습니다. `pgg init` 또는 `pgg dashboard --snapshot-only`를 먼저 실행하세요.\",\n+    loading: \"dashboard snapshot 로딩 중...\",\n+    projects: \"Projects\",\n+    overview: \"Overview\",\n+    topics: \"Topics\",\n+    workflow: \"Workflow\",\n+    settings: \"Settings\",\n+    registered: \"registered\",\n+    current: \"current\",\n+    active: \"active\",\n+    archive: \"archive\",\n+    language: \"language\",\n+    autoMode: \"auto mode\",\n+    provider: \"provider\",\n+    version: \"version\",\n+    health: \"health\",\n+    path: \"path\",\n+    missing: \"missing root\",\n+    partial: \"partial\",\n+    ok: \"ok\",\n+    noWorkflow: \"선택한 topic의 workflow 데이터가 없습니다.\",\n+    noTopics: \"필터 조건에 맞는 topic이 없습니다.\",\n+    searchPlaceholder: \"topic 검색\",\n+    generatedAt: \"generated\",\n+    commands: \"recommended commands\",\n+    topicNext: \"next action\",\n+    topicScore: \"last score\",\n+    topicBlock: \"blocking\",\n+    files: \"project files\",\n+    yes: \"yes\",\n+    no: \"no\"\n+  },\n+  en: {\n+    eyebrow: \"project operating board\",\n+    title: \"pgg dashboard\",\n+    empty: \"No registered projects. Run `pgg init` or `pgg dashboard --snapshot-only` first.\",\n+    loading: \"Loading dashboard snapshot...\",\n+    projects: \"Projects\",\n+    overview: \"Overview\",\n+    topics: \"Topics\",\n+    workflow: \"Workflow\",\n+    settings: \"Settings\",\n+    registered: \"registered\",\n+    current: \"current\",\n+    active: \"active\",\n+    archive: \"archive\",\n+    language: \"language\",\n+    autoMode: \"auto mode\",\n+    provider: \"provider\",\n+    version: \"version\",\n+    health: \"health\",\n+    path: \"path\",\n+    missing: \"missing root\",\n+    partial: \"partial\",\n+    ok: \"ok\",\n+    noWorkflow: \"No workflow data exists for the selected topic.\",\n+    noTopics: \"No topics match the active filter.\",\n+    searchPlaceholder: \"Search topics\",\n+    generatedAt: \"generated\",\n+    commands: \"recommended commands\",\n+    topicNext: \"next action\",\n+    topicScore: \"last score\",\n+    topicBlock: \"blocking\",\n+    files: \"project files\",\n+    yes: \"yes\",\n+    no: \"no\"\n+  }\n+} as const;\n+\n+function App() {\n+  const selectedProjectId = useDashboardStore((state) => state.selectedProjectId);\n+  const selectedTopicKey = useDashboardStore((state) => state.selectedTopicKey);\n+  const topicFilter = useDashboardStore((state) => state.topicFilter);\n+  const setSelectedProjectId = useDashboardStore((state) => state.setSelectedProjectId);\n+  const setSelectedTopicKey = useDashboardStore((state) => state.setSelectedTopicKey);\n+  const setTopicFilter = useDashboardStore((state) => state.setTopicFilter);\n+  const deferredFilter = useDeferredValue(topicFilter);\n+\n+  const snapshotQuery = useQuery({\n+    queryKey: [\"dashboard-snapshot\"],\n+    queryFn: async (): Promise<DashboardSnapshot> => {\n+      const response = await fetch(`/dashboard-data.json?ts=${Date.now()}`);\n+      if (!response.ok) {\n+        throw new Error(\"Failed to load dashboard snapshot.\");\n+      }\n+\n+      return (await response.json()) as DashboardSnapshot;\n+    },\n+    staleTime: Infinity\n+  });\n+\n+  const snapshot = snapshotQuery.data;\n+  const fallbackProject =\n+    snapshot?.projects.find((project) => project.id === snapshot.currentProjectId) ??\n+    snapshot?.projects[0] ??\n+    null;\n+  const selectedProject =\n+    snapshot?.projects.find((project) => project.id === selectedProjectId) ?? fallbackProject;\n+  const dictionary = copy[selectedProject?.language ?? \"en\"];\n+\n+  useEffect(() => {\n+    if (!snapshot?.projects.length) {\n+      return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!selectedProjectId) {\n+      const nextProjectId = snapshot.currentProjectId ?? snapshot.projects[0]?.id ?? null;\n+      startTransition(() => {\n+        setSelectedProjectId(nextProjectId);\n+      });\n+    }\n+  }, [selectedProjectId, setSelectedProjectId, snapshot]);\n+\n+  const allTopics = selectedProject\n+    ? [...selectedProject.activeTopics, ...selectedProject.archivedTopics]\n+    : [];\n+  const visibleTopics = allTopics.filter((topic) => {\n+    if (!deferredFilter.trim()) {\n+      return true;\n+    }\n+\n+    return `${topic.name} ${topic.stage ?? \"\"} ${topic.goal ?? \"\"}`\n+      .toLowerCase()\n+      .includes(deferredFilter.toLowerCase());\n+  });\n+  const selectedTopic =\n+    visibleTopics.find((topic) => `${topic.bucket}:${topic.name}` === selectedTopicKey) ??\n+    visibleTopics[0] ??\n+    null;\n+\n+  useEffect(() => {\n+    if (!visibleTopics.length) {\n+      return;\n+    }\n+\n+    if (!selectedTopicKey || !visibleTopics.some((topic) => `${topic.bucket}:${topic.name}` === selectedTopicKey)) {\n+      startTransition(() => {\n+        setSelectedTopicKey(`${visibleTopics[0]!.bucket}:${visibleTopics[0]!.name}`);\n+      });\n+    }\n+  }, [selectedTopicKey, setSelectedTopicKey, visibleTopics]);\n+\n+  if (snapshotQuery.isLoading) {\n+    return <main className=\"app-shell empty-state\">{dictionary.loading}</main>;\n+  }\n+\n+  if (!snapshot || snapshot.projects.length === 0) {\n+    return <main className=\"app-shell empty-state\">{dictionary.empty}</main>;\n+  }\n+\n+  return (\n+    <main className=\"app-shell\">\n+      <section className=\"hero\">\n+        <div>\n+          <p className=\"eyebrow\">{dictionary.eyebrow}</p>\n+          <h1>{dictionary.title}</h1>\n+        </div>\n+        <div className=\"hero-meta\">\n+          <span>{dictionary.generatedAt}</span>\n+          <strong>{new Date(snapshot.generatedAt).toLocaleString()}</strong>\n+        </div>\n+      </section>\n+\n+      <section className=\"layout\">\n+        <aside className=\"panel project-panel\">\n+          <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+            <h2>{dictionary.projects}</h2>\n+          </div>\n+          <div className=\"project-list\">\n+            {snapshot.projects.map((project) => {\n+              const isSelected = project.id === selectedProject?.id;\n+              return (\n+                <button\n+                  key={project.id}\n+                  className={`project-card${isSelected ? \" selected\" : \"\"}`}\n+                  onClick={() => {\n+                    startTransition(() => {\n+                      setSelectedProjectId(project.id);\n+                      setSelectedTopicKey(null);\n+                    });\n+                  }}\n+                  type=\"button\"\n+                >\n+                  <span className=\"project-chip\">{project.registered ? dictionary.registered : dictionary.current}</span>\n+                  <strong>{project.name}</strong>\n+                  <span>{project.rootDir}</span>\n+                  <div className=\"project-flags\">\n+                    <span>{project.language}</span>\n+                    <span>{project.autoMode}</span>\n+                    <span>{project.provider}</span>\n+                  </div>\n+                </button>\n+              );\n+            })}\n+          </div>\n+        </aside>\n+\n+        <section className=\"main-grid\">\n+          <article className=\"panel overview-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.overview}</h2>\n+            </div>\n+            {selectedProject ? (\n+              <div className=\"overview-grid\">\n+                <div className=\"metric-card accent\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.active}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.activeTopics.length}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"metric-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.archive}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.archivedTopics.length}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"metric-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.health}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.missingRoot ? dictionary.missing : dictionary.ok}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.path}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.rootDir}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.provider}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.provider}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.version}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.installedVersion ?? \"n/a\"}</strong>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"detail-card\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.files}</span>\n+                  <strong>\n+                    AGENTS {selectedProject.hasAgents ? dictionary.yes : dictionary.no} / .codex{\" \"}\n+                    {selectedProject.hasCodex ? dictionary.yes : dictionary.no} / poggn{\" \"}\n+                    {selectedProject.hasPoggn ? dictionary.yes : dictionary.no}\n+                  </strong>\n+                </div>\n+              </div>\n+            ) : null}\n+          </article>\n+\n+          <article className=\"panel topics-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.topics}</h2>\n+              <input\n+                className=\"topic-search\"\n+                onChange={(event) => setTopicFilter(event.target.value)}\n+                placeholder={dictionary.searchPlaceholder}\n+                value={topicFilter}\n+              />\n+            </div>\n+            <div className=\"topic-list\">\n+              {visibleTopics.length === 0 ? (\n+                <div className=\"empty-hint\">{dictionary.noTopics}</div>\n+              ) : (\n+                visibleTopics.map((topic) => {\n+                  const key = `${topic.bucket}:${topic.name}`;\n+                  const selected = key === selectedTopicKey;\n+                  return (\n+                    <button\n+                      key={key}\n+                      className={`topic-card${selected ? \" selected\" : \"\"}`}\n+                      onClick={() => {\n+                        startTransition(() => {\n+                          setSelectedTopicKey(key);\n+                        });\n+                      }}\n+                      type=\"button\"\n+                    >\n+                      <div className=\"topic-card-top\">\n+                        <strong>{topic.name}</strong>\n+                        <span className={`badge ${topic.bucket}`}>{topic.bucket}</span>\n+                      </div>\n+                      <span>{topic.stage ?? \"-\"}</span>\n+                      <p>{topic.goal ?? \"-\"}</p>\n+                      <div className=\"topic-meta\">\n+                        <span>\n+                          {dictionary.topicScore}: {topic.score ?? \"-\"}\n+                        </span>\n+                        <span>{topic.health === \"ok\" ? dictionary.ok : dictionary.partial}</span>\n+                      </div>\n+                    </button>\n+                  );\n+                })\n+              )}\n+            </div>\n+          </article>\n+\n+          <article className=\"panel workflow-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.workflow}</h2>\n+            </div>\n+            {selectedTopic?.workflow ? (\n+              <div className=\"workflow-canvas\">\n+                <ReactFlow\n+                  fitView\n+                  nodes={selectedTopic.workflow.nodes}\n+                  edges={selectedTopic.workflow.edges}\n+                  nodesDraggable={false}\n+                  panOnDrag\n+                >\n+                  <MiniMap />\n+                  <Controls />\n+                  <Background />\n+                </ReactFlow>\n+              </div>\n+            ) : (\n+              <div className=\"empty-hint\">{dictionary.noWorkflow}</div>\n+            )}\n+          </article>\n+\n+          <article className=\"panel settings-panel\">\n+            <div className=\"panel-header\">\n+              <h2>{dictionary.settings}</h2>\n+            </div>\n+            {selectedProject ? (\n+              <div className=\"settings-stack\">\n+                <div className=\"setting-item\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.language}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.language}</strong>\n+                  <code>pgg lang --cwd \"{selectedProject.rootDir}\"</code>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"setting-item\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.autoMode}</span>\n+                  <strong>{selectedProject.autoMode}</strong>\n+                  <code>pgg auto --cwd \"{selectedProject.rootDir}\"</code>\n+                </div>\n+                <div className=\"setting-item\">\n+                  <span>{dictionary.commands}</span>\n+                  <code>pgg update --cwd \"{selectedProject.rootDir}\"</code>\n+                </div>\n+                {selectedTopic ? (\n+                  <div className=\"setting-item topic-callout\">\n+                    <span>{dictionary.topicNext}</span>\n+                    <strong>{selectedTopic.nextAction ?? \"-\"}</strong>\n+                    <span>\n+                      {dictionary.topicBlock}: {selectedTopic.blockingIssues ?? \"-\"}\n+                    </span>\n+                  </div>\n+                ) : null}\n+              </div>\n+            ) : null}\n+          </article>\n+        </section>\n+      </section>\n+    </main>\n+  );\n+}\n+\n+export default App;\n",
+                    "contentType": "text/x-diff",
+                    "updatedAt": "2026-04-20T14:58:42.819Z"
+                  }
+                }

b/packages/core/src/readme.ts\n@@ -0,0 +1,142 @@\n+import { writeFile } from \"node:fs/promises\";\n+import path from \"node:path\";\n+\n+function lines(parts: string[]): string {\n+  return `${parts.join(\"\\n\")}\\n`;\n+}\n+\n+export function buildRootReadme(): string {\n+  return lines([\n+    \"# pgg\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"pgg is a pnpm-based workspace that turns the `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, and `poggn` workflow into a reusable CLI and dashboard product.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"pgg는 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `poggn` 워크플로를 재사용 가능한 CLI와 dashboard 제품으로 정리한 pnpm workspace입니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Quick Start\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"이 저장소에서 바로 동작을 확인하려면 아래 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm install\",\n+    \"pnpm build\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --snapshot-only\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"현재 저장소 기준 예시는 모두 local workspace 실행 경로인 `node packages/cli/dist/index.js ...`를 사용합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"`@pgg/cli` package 기준 global link와 설치 문서는 `packages/cli/README.md`를 참고합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"To try the repository locally, run the workspace build first and then execute the CLI from `packages/cli/dist`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"All examples in this repository use the local workspace entrypoint: `node packages/cli/dist/index.js ...`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"For package-level install and global link usage, see `packages/cli/README.md`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Commands\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: 대상 프로젝트에 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, manifest를 생성하고 registry에 등록합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: generator 관리 자산을 현재 버전에 맞게 다시 동기화합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: `ko`, `en` 전환과 관련 generated asset 반영을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: exports a snapshot or launches the local operations dashboard.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Workflow\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"`pgg`는 topic을 `poggn/active/<topic>` 아래에서 관리하고 다음 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"1. `pgg-add`: proposal 생성\",\n+    \"2. `pgg-plan`: plan, task, spec 생성\",\n+    \"3. `pgg-code`: 구현과 diff 기록\",\n+    \"4. `pgg-qa`: 테스트, 리뷰, archive 판정\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"검증이 끝난 topic만 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Topics live under `poggn/active/<topic>` and move through proposal, planning, implementation, and QA before archive.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Only QA-passed topics move to `poggn/archive/<topic>`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Project Structure\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `.codex/`: workflow 규칙, skill, shell helper\",\n+    \"- `poggn/`: active/archive topic 문서와 상태 기록\",\n+    \"- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\",\n+    \"- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `.codex/`: workflow rules, skills, and shell helpers\",\n+    \"- `poggn/`: active and archived topic records\",\n+    \"- `AGENTS.md`: Codex-specific working rules\",\n+    \"- `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm dev:dashboard\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /path/to/project --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"The dashboard reads the current project and registry snapshot to show topic health, workflow state, language, auto mode, and the saved dashboard port.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"Use `pnpm dev:dashboard` for local UI work, or run the CLI dashboard command to generate and serve project data.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Notes\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- 현재 provider 구현 범위는 `codex`입니다.\",\n+    \"- `README.md`는 generator가 관리하는 문서 자산입니다.\",\n+    \"- project-level README 생성과 `pgg update` 직접 연동은 후속 범위입니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- The current provider implementation is limited to `codex`.\",\n+    \"- This `README.md` is intended to be a generator-managed document asset.\",\n+    \"- Project-level README generation and direct `pgg update` wiring remain future work.\"\n+  ]);\n+}\n+\n+export async function writeRootReadme(rootDir: string): Promise<string> {\n+  const target = path.join(rootDir, \"README.md\");\n+  await writeFile(target, buildRootReadme(), \"utf8\");\n+  return target;\n+}\n",
+                    "contentType": "text/x-diff",
+                    "updatedAt": "2026-04-20T16:04:35.064Z"
+                  }

Commands\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- `pgg init`: 대상 프로젝트에 `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, manifest를 생성하고 registry에 등록합니다.\n+- `pgg update`: generator 관리 자산을 현재 버전에 맞게 다시 동기화합니다.\n+- `pgg lang`: `ko`, `en` 전환과 관련 generated asset 반영을 수행합니다.\n+- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\n+- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\n+- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\n+- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\n+- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\n+- `pgg dashboard`: exports a snapshot or launches the local operations dashboard.\n+\n+## Workflow\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+`pgg`는 topic을 `poggn/active/<topic>` 아래에서 관리하고 다음 순서로 진행합니다.\n+\n+1. `pgg-add`: proposal 생성\n+2. `pgg-plan`: plan, task, spec 생성\n+3. `pgg-code`: 구현과 diff 기록\n+4. `pgg-qa`: 테스트, 리뷰, archive 판정\n+\n+검증이 끝난 topic만 `poggn/archive/<topic>`으로 이동합니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+Topics live under `poggn/active/<topic>` and move through proposal, planning, implementation, and QA before archive.\n+\n+Only QA-passed topics move to `poggn/archive/<topic>`.\n+\n+## Project Structure\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- `.codex/`: workflow 규칙, skill, shell helper\n+- `poggn/`: active/archive topic 문서와 상태 기록\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex 작업 규칙\n+- `packages/core`: generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\n+- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\n+- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- `.codex/`: workflow rules, skills, and shell helpers\n+- `poggn/`: active and archived topic records\n+- `AGENTS.md`: Codex-specific working rules\n+- `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\n+- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\n+- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\n+\n+## Dashboard\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\n+\n+로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm dev:dashboard\n+```\n+\n+또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js dashboard --cwd /path/to/project --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173\n+```\n+\n+### en\n+\n+The dashboard reads the current project and registry snapshot to show topic health, workflow state, language, auto mode, and the saved dashboard port.\n+\n+Use `pnpm dev:dashboard` for local UI work, or run the CLI dashboard command to generate and serve project data.\n+\n+## Notes\n+\n+### ko\n+\n+- 현재 provider 구현 범위는 `codex`입니다.\n+- `README.md`는 generator가 관리하는 문서 자산입니다.\n+- project-level README 생성과 `pgg update` 직접 연동은 후속 범위입니다.\n+\n+### en\n+\n+- The current provider implementation is limited to `codex`.\n+- This `README.md` is intended to be a generator-managed document asset.\n+- Project-level README generation and direct `pgg update` wiring remain future work.\n",

+                  "label": "CREATE packages/cli/README.md",
+                  "path": "packages/cli/README.md",
+                  "crud": "CREATE",
+                  "diffRef": "implementation/diffs/005_CREATE_packages_cli_README_md.diff",
+                  "detail": {
+                    "kind": "diff",
+                    "title": "CREATE packages/cli/README.md",
+                    "sourcePath": "poggn/archive/pgg-readme-global-link-flow/implementation/diffs/005_CREATE_packages_cli_README_md.diff",
+                    "content": "diff --git a/packages/cli/README.md b/packages/cli/README.md\nnew file mode 100644\nindex 0000000..5e2dbfc\n--- /dev/null\n+++ b/packages/cli/README.md\n@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@\n+# `@pgg/cli`\n+\n+`@pgg/cli` is the publishable package surface for the `pgg` command.\n+\n+`@pgg/cli`는 `pgg` 명령을 배포하는 package 표면입니다.\n+\n+## Local Workspace Build\n+\n+루트 workspace에서 먼저 CLI를 빌드합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm install\n+pnpm --filter @pgg/cli build\n+```\n+\n+## Global Link\n+\n+workspace 루트에서 아래 명령으로 CLI package만 global link 합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+pnpm --filter @pgg/cli link --global\n+pgg --help\n+```\n+\n+또는 `packages/cli` 디렉터리에서 직접 실행할 수 있습니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+cd packages/cli\n+pnpm link --global\n+pgg --help\n+```\n+\n+## Local Run Without Linking\n+\n+global link 없이 현재 저장소에서 직접 실행하려면 root README와 같이 local workspace entrypoint를 사용합니다.\n+\n+```bash\n+node packages/cli/dist/index.js init --cwd /tmp/pgg-sample --provider codex --lang ko --auto on\n+```\n+\n+## Notes\n+\n+- root `README.md`는 workspace 개발 문서입니다.\n+- package install, publish, global link 표면은 이 문서를 기준으로 유지합니다.\n",

+                    "updatedAt": "2026-04-20T16:03:03.505Z"
+                  }

 \"\",\n+    \"## Quick Start\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"이 저장소에서 바로 동작을 확인하려면 아래 순서로 진행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm install\",\n+    \"pnpm build\",\n+ \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"설치형 CLI로 사용할 때는 같은 명령을 `pgg init`, `pgg update`, `pgg lang`, `pgg auto`, `pgg dashboard` 형태로 실행할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"To try the repository locally, run the workspace build first and then execute the CLI from `packages/cli/dist`.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"When the package is installed as a CLI, the same flows are available through 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: `on`, `off` 전환과 auto mode 관련 문서 상태를 반영합니다.\",\n+    \"- `pgg dashboard`: snapshot export 또는 로컬 dashboard 실행을 수행합니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"- `pgg init`: creates `.codex`, `AGENTS.md`, `.claude`, `poggn`, and the local manifest for a target project.\",\n+    \"- `pgg update`: resynchronizes generator-managed assets to the current product shape.\",\n+    \"- `pgg lang`: switches between `ko` and `en` and updates generated assets.\",\n+    \"- `pgg auto`: switches workflow auto mode between `on` and `off`.\",\n+    \"- `pgg generator, manifest, registry, analyzer\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: `pgg` CLI 엔트리\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: React, React Query, React Flow, Zustand 기반 운영 UI\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### en\",\n+ `packages/core`: generators, manifest IO, registry helpers, analyzers\",\n+    \"- `packages/cli`: the `pgg` CLI entrypoint\",\n+    \"- `apps/dashboard`: the local React operations dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"## Dashboard\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"### ko\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"dashboard는 현재 프로젝트와 registry snapshot을 읽어 topic 상태, workflow, 언어, auto mode, dashboard 기본 포트를 보여줍니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"로컬 개발에서는 아래 스크립트를 사용할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"```bash\",\n+    \"pnpm dev:dashboard\",\n+    \"```\",\n+    \"\",\n+    \"또는 CLI를 통해 snapshot 생성과 함께 실행할 수 있습니다.\",\n+    \"\",\n+
